policy.evidenceScope: GOAL 01-06 generated evidence only. This matrix does not modify source, does not trust existing headless implementation, and does not execute card-porting.

needLevelRules.description: headless 엔진 기준선에 직접 필요한 원본 로직 또는 카드 데이터
headless 런타임 직접 구현 대상은 아니지만 원본 재현, GUID, Unity 프로젝트 맥락, 의존성 확인에 필요한 참조
후속 Goal에서 headless 필요 여부를 추가 검증해야 하는 후보
headless battle engine 기준선에는 기본적으로 제외하는 생성물, 빌드 산출물, 시각/사운드 전용 파일
현 단계 증거만으로 필요 여부를 판단하지 않는 항목

classificationRules: SourceOfTruth C# runtime and CardEffect source files are Required evidence, but individual CardEffect body implementation remains prohibited by Foundation Gate.
CardBaseEntity .asset files are Required data extraction sources; their .meta sidecars are Reference provenance.
VisualOnly and SoundOnly assets are Excluded from headless runtime unless a later UnityAdapter or data-provenance goal explicitly promotes them.
GeneratedCache, BuildArtifact, and RuntimeOutput are Excluded because they are reproducible or execution outputs.
ExternalPackage files are Reference only; they are not copied into the headless engine without a later dependency decision.
